catalog_content:
Item Name: Ann Clark Strawberry Powder, 5 oz.
Bullet Point 1: Sweet, wholesome strawberry flavor: Made from 100% natural freeze-dried strawberries preserved at the peak of their freshness, this powder delivers concentrated strawberry flavor that is naturally sweet, with no added sugar.
Bullet Point 2: A pantry staple: This shelf-stable alternative to fresh strawberries adds a burst of delicious strawberry to any recipe. It can be used in baked goods, icings and glazes, or smoothies for the delicious flavor of fresh-picked strawberries year-round.
Bullet Point 3: Quick, convenient, and dependable: Natural powdered strawberry powder ensures that you can add the flavor of fresh strawberries to any recipe easily, without adding additional liquid or relying on fresh strawberries for flavor.
Bullet Point 4: Finest Ingredients: Ann Clark proudly sources and develops the finest ingredients so that you can bake with confidence.
Bullet Point 5: Ann Clark's promise: Uncompromisingly great taste. America’s largest manufacturer of cookie cutters is now a trusted name in food coloring, baking supplies, ingredients, and baking mixes. The company was founded and is still run by the Clark family for over 30 years.
Product Description: Add the sweet, wholesome flavor of freshly picked strawberries to baked goods, icings, glazes, and drinks with Ann Clark Strawberry Powder. Made from 100% all-natural freeze-dried strawberries preserved at the height of freshness, this powder delivers the fruity flavors of strawberries in a shelf-stable powder. Add to baked goods like macarons, scones, and cookies for a sweet fruity twist, or use in drinks or as a flavored sugar rim to elevate any cocktail. Strawberry powder can also be added to icings, overnight oats recipes, or smoothies for additional lusciously sweet strawberry flavor – with no added sugar. Ann Clark Strawberry Powder is convenient and easy to use, and offers fresh, concentrated strawberry flavor in a long-lasting powder form.
Value: 8.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A specialty baking ingredient positioned as a convenient, shelf-stable alternative to fresh strawberries, targeting home bakers and food enthusiasts. The product emphasizes its natural, no-added-sugar claim and versatility across multiple culinary applications, suggesting a mid-tier niche market appeal. Packaging and branding lack premium cues but highlight functional convenience and quality ingredient sourcing, with pricing likely influenced by its specialized use case and natural ingredient focus.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Artisana Organics Raw Walnut Butter with Cashews - No Sugar Added, Just Two Ingredients - Vegan, Paleo, Keto Friendly Snack, 1.06oz Pouches (10 Pack)
Bullet Point 1: ONLY TWO INGREDIENTS: The only ingredients you will find in our Walnut Butter is 100% organic, pure walnuts and cashews—no additives of any kind and never palm oil.
Bullet Point 2: FROM ORGANIC FAMILY FARMS: Our nuts come from farmers who grow their produce in harmony with the land and who treat their workers fairly and with respect.
Bullet Point 3: MADE IN SMALL BATCHES USING A TEMPERATURE CONTROLLED PROCESS: Our organic foods are crafted in small batches using a temperature controlled process to protect fatty acids, proteins, vitamins, and enzymes.
Bullet Point 4: NEVER ROASTED, TOASTED, OR COOKED: We believe nature does food right, which is why we use raw walnuts and cashews to make our butter.
Bullet Point 5: FITS INTO MANY LIFESTYLES: Our Walnut Butter is always organic, vegan, non-GMO, kosher, gluten free, dairy free, peanut free, and certified R.A.W., making it perfect for vegan, plant-based, keto, and paleo diets.
Value: 10.6
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic brand positioning with multiple health-focused certifications (USDA Organic, Non-GMO, R.A.W., Clean) suggests a higher price point than conventional nut butters. The multi-pack format (10 x 1.06 oz pouches) provides perceived value for bulk buyers, while the artisanal, small-batch production and absence of additives justify premium pricing. Vegan, keto, and paleo-friendly claims broaden its appeal to niche health-conscious consumers, likely commanding a price premium over standard nut butters.
